# stremio_installed_addons (Data Source)

Reads installed Stremio addons for the authenticated account.

## Example Usage

```hcl
data "stremio_installed_addons" "current" {}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `catalog_type` (String) Optional filter for addon catalog type.
- `name_regex` (String) Optional regular expression filter applied to addon name.
- `resource` (String) Optional filter for addon resource name (for example `catalog`, `meta`, `stream`).
- `sort_by` (String) Optional sort field: `name`, `addon_id`, or `version`.
- `sort_order` (String) Optional sort order: `asc` or `desc`. Defaults to `asc` when `sort_by` is set.
- `type` (String) Optional filter for addon-supported content type (for example `movie`, `series`, `tv`).

### Read-Only

- `addons` (Attributes List) List of installed addon descriptors. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--addons))
- `id` (String) Static identifier for this data source instance.

<a id="nestedatt--addons"></a>
### Nested Schema for `addons`

Read-Only:

- `addon_id` (String) Addon identifier from manifest metadata when available.
- `catalog_types` (List of String) Catalog types advertised by addon catalogs when available.
- `name` (String) Addon display name when provided by descriptor metadata.
- `resources` (List of String) Resource names advertised by the addon when available.
- `transport_url` (String) Addon `transportUrl` value.
- `types` (List of String) Content types this addon supports when available.
- `version` (String) Addon version from manifest metadata when available.
